intent_precise: APIv2 PCR Prep 3/4: EXO: Using Labcon Plate on PCR Cooler (pcr_plate, slot 1), PCR Strip on PCR Cooler (labware, slot 2). (1) Pause: Replace 20ul tipracks before resuming. (2) Transfer 2µL from PCR Strip on PCR Cooler A1 to destination A1. (3) Pause for manual intervention.
intent: For the EXO step of PCR Prep, start by setting up your Labcon plate in slot 1 and PCR strip in slot 2, both on the PCR cooler. Make sure to replace the 20µL tipracks before you begin, then transfer 2µL from well A1 of the PCR strip to well A1 of the destination plate. Once that transfer is complete, pause for any manual intervention that might be needed.

commands.message: Part 3/4 (EXO) complete. Please remove plate             from Slot 1 and run on PCR program. When ready, load materials             and run Part 4/4 (PCR) on the OT-2.
